description: Capability set for the dm-detail secondary window. Receives the DM event via IPC (core:event) and invokes the dm_detail_window_ready handshake + show/focus. Without this file the window's invoke()/listen calls silently fail the capability check, so dm_detail_window_ready never reaches Rust and the window (created visible:false, shown only by the handshake) never appears — the symptom is clicking 'Open details' on a DM notification doing nothing. Mirrors share-detail.json.
